mapper.select: SELECT cuisine AS caixi, image AS tupian, dish_type AS caipinleixing, ingredients AS cailiao, cooking_method AS pengrenfangfa, audit_status AS auditStatus, audit_reply AS auditReply, view_count AS clicknum FROM recipe chinese_recipe 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment}

SELECT cuisine AS caixi, image AS tupian, dish_type AS caipinleixing, ingredients AS cailiao, cooking_method AS pengrenfangfa, audit_status AS auditStatus, audit_reply AS auditReply, view_count AS clicknum FROM recipe chinese_recipe 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment}

SELECT chinese_recipe.id, chinese_recipe.dish_name AS caipinmingcheng, chinese_recipe.cuisine AS caixi, chinese_recipe.image AS tupian, chinese_recipe.dish_type AS caipinleixing, chinese_recipe.ingredients AS cailiao, chinese_recipe.cooking_method AS pengrenfangfa, chinese_recipe.user_id AS userId, chinese_recipe.created_at AS createdAt, chinese_recipe.audit_status AS auditStatus, chinese_recipe.audit_reply AS auditReply, chinese_recipe.view_count AS viewCount, chinese_recipe.source_type AS sourceType FROM recipe chinese_recipe 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment}

SELECT chinese_recipe.id, chinese_recipe.dish_name AS caipinmingcheng, chinese_recipe.cuisine AS caixi, chinese_recipe.image AS tupian, chinese_recipe.dish_type AS caipinleixing, chinese_recipe.ingredients AS cailiao, chinese_recipe.cooking_method AS pengrenfangfa, chinese_recipe.user_id AS userId, chinese_recipe.created_at AS createdAt, chinese_recipe.audit_status AS auditStatus, chinese_recipe.audit_reply AS auditReply, chinese_recipe.view_count AS viewCount, chinese_recipe.source_type AS sourceType FROM recipe chinese_recipe 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment}
